## Problem Statement

A clear description of the problem or gap this feature would address.

## Proposed Solution

Describe how you would like this feature to work.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Use Case

Describe the use case that motivates this feature. Who benefits and how?

## Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references here.
